title: triticum cereale var. turgidum
intro: Triticum cereale var. turgidum, also known as durum wheat or emmer wheat, is an ancient type of wheat that belongs to the genus Triticum and the family Poaceae. The plant has been used for medicinal purposes due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Triticum cereale var. turgidum include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or supplements, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues.
